Config-driven swap, same tmux pane model.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"github@bkuri.com","created_at":"2026-04-10T04:55:37Z","created_by":"Bernardo Kuri","updated_at":"2026-04-10T04:55:37Z"}

{"id":"bd-gne","title":"Capture pi worker completion events via --mode json","description":"Use pi --mode json to capture structured events from workers for positive completion detection.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"github@bkuri.com","created_at":"2026-04-10T04:55:37Z","created_by":"Bernardo Kuri","updated_at":"2026-04-10T04:55:37Z"}

new_value: Added pi as worker agent backend. Pi agents use --no-session --mode json with tee to trace file. Config supports type=pi and pi_args.
Added agent_events.py to parse pi JSON output for completion detection. _inject_contract tees pi output to agent trace file. check_agent_done provides positive completion signal.
